title: sedum erici-magnusii subsp. erici-magnusii
intro: Sedum erici-magnusii subsp. erici-magnusii, also known as Eriogonum fasciculatum, is a succulent plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sedum erici-magnusii subsp. erici-magnusii include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing protection against oxidative stress. Sedum erici-magnusii subsp. erici-magnusii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications for its soothing and protective properties.
